queries.question: the hospital was designed by which architect?
queries.sql:
SELECT name
FROM Architect JOIN Building ON Building.architect_id = Architect.id
WHERE building_name = 'Hospital'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?architect a :Architect .
  ?building a :Building .
  ?building p:hasArchitect ?architect .
  ?architect p:name ?name .
  ?building p:building_name ?building_name_f .
  FILTER(?building_name_f = "Hospital")
}

queries.question: Show all firms.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?firm a :Firm .
  ?firm p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show all architects.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?architect a :Architect .
  ?architect p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show all architects and firms.
queries.sql:
SELECT Firm.name, Architect.name
FROM Architect JOIN Building ON Building.architect_id = Architect.id  JOIN Firm ON Building.firm_id = Firm.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?architect a :Architect .
  ?building a :Building .
  ?building p:hasArchitect ?architect .
  ?firm a :Firm .
  ?building p:hasFirm ?firm .
  ?firm p:name ?name .
  ?architect p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: Which firm designed the hospital?
queries.sql:
SELECT name
FROM Firm JOIN Building ON Building.firm_id = Firm.id
WHERE building_name = 'Hospital'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?firm a :Firm .
  ?building a :Building .
  ?building p:hasFirm ?firm .
  ?firm p:name ?name .
  ?building p:building_name ?building_name_f .
  FILTER(?building_name_f = "Hospital")
}
